title: dupatya bisulcata
intro: Dupatya bisulcata, also known as the Bisected Dupatya, is a type of flowering plant species in the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Dupatya bisulcata include wound healing, skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Dupatya bisulcata may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
